subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating.

We’d be happy to explore this further. Please suggest a few time slots that work well for you over the next two weeks (including your timezone), and we’ll confirm one on our side.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: as a policy, we don’t share internal direct phone lines or personal contact information externally. Once we’ve aligned on next steps, we’ll make sure the appropriate stakeholders are included in any follow-up meetings.

Best regards,
Agent
